case_title: DALY INVESTMENT CO.,A CALIF CORP vs. SEYMOUR, GILBERT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALY INVESTMENT CO.,A CALIF CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, GILBERT
